title: Echo Redis Cache-Aside with Go
summary: Serve a product detail request in Echo with a Redis cache-aside flow and a database fallback.
highlights: Falls back to DB on misses
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4 on macOS. Automated tests stub CacheGet, CacheSet, and FindProductByID, so no live Redis server is required. Runtime cache hits can be observed by running Redis locally and requesting the same product twice.
